ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_assessment: High quality, clearly legible text-based PDF with all fields clearly readable.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_assessment: High quality, clearly legible text-based PDF. All fields clearly readable.

lc_check.motivation: The invoice contains the text 'Documentary credit' in the 'Mode of transport' / 'Shipment' field area. However, this is a DESCRIPTIVE label for the mode of transport/payment method — it does NOT contain a specific, individual LC number. According to rule 2.2, the LC exception shall ONLY be activated when a CONCRETE number is stated in direct connection with the LC reference. Furthermore, per the critical rule on bank term context (2.2), the term 'Documentary credit' here is used as a general descriptor, not as a field label followed by a specific LC number. No LC number is present anywhere in the certificate or invoice. Therefore, the LC exception is NOT activated.

Footer block: 'Ericsson AB' with VAT no SE5560566625801, Reg office: Ericsson AB SE-164 83 Stockholm, Sweden
Remit to: 'Ericsson AB Torshamnsgatan 23 SE-164 83 STOCKHOLM'

criteria_met: Criterion 1: Certificate invoice reference '9209877429' matches invoice number '9209877429'.
Criterion 2: Certificate consignor 'ERICSSON AB' is identifiable in the invoice (header logo 'ERICSSON', footer 'Ericsson AB').
Criterion 3: Certificate consignee 'SAFARICOM LIMITED' is identifiable in the invoice as 'SAFARICOM' in Bill to, Ship to, and Sold to fields.
pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing validation criteria are met. The document pair is valid.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, SE-164 83 STOCKHOLM, Stockholm, Sweden (from footer/remit-to)

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'ERICSSON AB' anywhere in the invoice.
comparison_steps.details: The name 'Ericsson AB' is found explicitly in the invoice footer (VAT block, Remit to block, Reg office block) and the header branding shows 'ERICSSON'. The invoice is issued by Ericsson AB. Direct match found — no need to proceed to 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Country verification via indirect identifiers — VAT prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden; 'Stockholm,Sweden' in Reg office confirms Sweden

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'ERICSSON AB', Torshamnsgatan 23, 164 83 Stockholm, Sweden. Invoice: The invoice is issued by 'Ericsson AB' as clearly stated in the footer block (VAT no: SE556056625801, Reg office: Ericsson AB SE-164 83 Stockholm, Sweden, Remit to: Ericsson AB Torshamnsgatan 23 SE-164 83 STOCKHOLM). The header also shows 'ERICSSON' branding. Name match: 'ERICSSON AB' (cert) = 'Ericsson AB' (invoice) after case normalization. Country match: Certificate states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice footer states 'Stockholm,Sweden' and VAT prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden. Both name and country verified. Rule 4.1.0 applies — consignor found explicitly in invoice. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'ERICSSON AB' i Sverige kan identifieras i fakturan som fakturautställaren 'Ericsson AB' med registreringsadress Torshamnsgatan 23, SE-164 83 Stockholm, Sweden. Företagsnamn och land överensstämmer exakt efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.

checkpoints.certificate_value: SAFARICOM LIMITED, SAFARICOM HOUSE WAIYAKI WAY, P.O. BOX 66827-00800, NAIROBI, KENYA
checkpoints.invoice_value: SAFARICOM, PO Box 46350, 00100 NAIROBI, KENYA (Bill to) / SAFARICOM, SAFARICOM HOUSE WAIYAKI WAY NAIROBI, 00800 NAIROBI, KENYA (Ship to / Sold to)

comparison_steps.description: Identify the authoritative consignee field in the invoice using priority order.
comparison_steps.result: Bill to field found: 'SAFARICOM' at PO Box 46350, 00100 NAIROBI, KENYA. This is the primary billing field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee 'SAFARICOM LIMITED' against invoice Bill to 'SAFARICOM'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH via 4.1.3.5 (omitted organization words). Core name 'SAFARICOM' is identical. 'LIMITED' is a legal entity form word (Ltd/Limited). Applying 4.1.3.6 — difference solely in legal company form designation.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate country: KENYA. Invoice Bill to country: KENYA.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification — Bill to field has priority
rules_applied.result: Bill to field identified: SAFARICOM, PO Box 46350, 00100 NAIROBI, KENYA

rules_applied.description: Legal entity form abbreviation — 'SAFARICOM LIMITED' vs 'SAFARICOM': difference is only the legal form word 'LIMITED'
Address differences (P.O. BOX 66827-00800 vs PO Box 46350, 00100) do not cause MISMATCH per rule 4.2.4
rules_applied.result: Address difference noted but not causing MISMATCH

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'SAFARICOM LIMITED', SAFARICOM HOUSE WAIYAKI WAY, P.O. BOX 66827-00800, NAIROBI, KENYA. Invoice Bill to (primary per 4.2.0.2): 'SAFARICOM', PO Box 46350, 00100 NAIROBI, KENYA. Name comparison: Certificate says 'SAFARICOM LIMITED', invoice says 'SAFARICOM'. The word 'LIMITED' is a legal entity form (rule 4.1.3.6). Core name 'SAFARICOM' is identical in both documents. Per rule 4.1.3.6, differences solely in legal company form designation are acceptable when: (1) core name is identical — yes, 'SAFARICOM' = 'SAFARICOM'; (2) no other entity with similar name — confirmed, all invoice parties named SAFARICOM are the same entity; (3) address and country match — country is KENYA in both. The P.O. Box differs (66827-00800 in cert vs 46350 in invoice), but per rule 4.2.4, address differences (street, office, postal code) do not cause MISMATCH — only company name and country matter. Additionally, 'SAFARICOM' appears in Ship to and Sold to with address 'SAFARICOM HOUSE WAIYAKI WAY NAIROBI' matching certificate address, further confirming identity. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'SAFARICOM LIMITED' i Kenya kan identifieras i fakturans Bill to-fält som 'SAFARICOM' i Kenya. Skillnaden består enbart i det juridiska bolagsformsordet 'LIMITED' som saknas i fakturan — detta accepteras enligt regel 4.1.3.6. Kärnnamnet 'SAFARICOM' är identiskt och land (Kenya) överensstämmer.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH due to different P.O. Box numbers (66827-00800 vs 46350)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.2.4, differences in street address or postal code do not cause MISMATCH. The company name and country are the determining factors.

checkpoints.certificate_value: PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006 /HS code 851779000000/ Hungary; Invoice No. 9209877429 dated 2026-01-22
checkpoints.invoice_value: PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006; HS code 851779000000; CoO HU; Invoice No. 9209877429 dated 2026-01-22

comparison_steps.description: No article number stated in certificate. Proceeding to text matching. Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate: 'PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006'.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006'. Invoice: 'PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006'. EXACT MATCH after case normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate HS code: 851779000000. Invoice HS code: 851779000000.
Certificate references Invoice No. 9209877429 dated 2026-01-22. Invoice shows Invoice No. 9209877429, Invoice Date 2026-01-22.
comparison_steps.result: EXACT MATCH on both invoice number and date.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation 'PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006' matches exactly
General goods description with invoice reference — invoice number and date both match exactly

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006 /HS code 851779000000/ Hungary'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006'. Invoice line item 000101 description: 'PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006'. This is an exact textual match after case normalization. HS code in certificate: 851779000000, in invoice: 851779000000 — exact match. Certificate also references Invoice No. 9209877429 dated 2026-01-22. Invoice header confirms Invoice No. 9209877429 and Invoice Date 2026-01-22 — exact match on both. No article number in certificate to verify via Priority 1. The goods description is fully verified via both Priority 2 (text match) and Priority 3 (invoice reference). MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006' med HS-kod 851779000000 kan identifieras exakt i fakturans artikelrad. Fakturanummer 9209877429 och datum 2026-01-22 överensstämmer exakt mellan certifikat och faktura.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 1 item (box 7); Total gross weight: 1,500 KG (box 6); 1 package consisting of 1 item (box 6)
checkpoints.invoice_value: 1,00 PC (line item qty); Total gross weight 1,500 KG; Number of packages 1

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '1 item'. This is the verification-basis quantity per rule 4.4.2.1.
Certificate box 7: '1 item'. Invoice line item quantity: '1,00 PC' (=1 piece). Numeric value 1 matches 1. Unit: 'item' and 'PC' (piece) are comparable unit designations for count-based quantities.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — numeric value 1 identified in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 6 states 'Total gross weight: 1,500 KG'. Invoice states 'Total gross weight 1,500 KG'. Applying thousands separator normalization (4.4.3.3): the comma in '1,500' is a thousands separator (both are integers expressed as 1500 KG). Both documents use the same notation '1,500 KG'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — 1,500 KG = 1,500 KG (same notation, same value 1500 KG or 1.5 KG depending on locale interpretation).

comparison_steps.description: Both certificate and invoice use the IDENTICAL notation '1,500 KG'. Since both documents use the same notation, whether '1,500' means 1500 or 1.5, the values are identical between the two documents. The identity of notation confirms match.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — identical notation in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check — numeric value 1 from box 7 identified in invoice line item (1,00 PC)
Multiple quantities — at least one verified (1 item = 1 PC). Gross weight also verified (1,500 KG = 1,500 KG, identical notation).
Package/consignment quantity — '1 package' in certificate, '1' in invoice Number of packages

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate contains multiple quantity statements: (1) Box 7: '1 item'; (2) Box 6: 'Total gross weight: 1,500 KG'; (3) Box 6: '1 package consisting of 1 item'. Per rule 4.4.2.1, the verification-basis is box 7: '1 item'. Invoice shows quantity '1,00 PC' for the line item — numeric value 1 matches 1. Per rule 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity must be verified — the box 7 value of 1 item is verified against invoice's 1,00 PC. Additionally, gross weight: certificate says '1,500 KG' and invoice says '1,500 KG' — identical notation, so this also matches. Package count: certificate says '1 package', invoice says 'Number of packages: 1' — matches. No contradictory values found. All quantity indicators are consistent. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet '1 item' (box 7) kan identifieras i fakturans artikelrad som '1,00 PC'. Bruttovikt '1,500 KG' i certifikatet överensstämmer exakt med fakturans 'Total gross weight 1,500 KG'. Kolliantal '1 package' bekräftas av fakturans 'Number of packages: 1'. Samtliga kvantitetsuppgifter är konsistenta.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice line item 000101 contains 'CoO' (Country of Origin) column with value 'HU'.
Certificate: 'Hungary'. Invoice: 'HU'. HU is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for Hungary. Normalization of full country name to ISO code is explicitly allowed per 4.5.4.

Hungary is an EU member state (HU is in the EU-27 list). The certificate header states 'EUROPEAN UNION' but box 3 specifically states 'Hungary'. The invoice CoO field states 'HU'. Since 'Hungary' = 'HU' via ISO normalization, this is a direct match. EU normalization (4.5.4.2) would also support this since Hungary is an EU member, but direct match takes precedence.
comparison_steps.result: Direct MATCH via ISO code normalization.

rules_applied.description: Normalization of country name to ISO code — Hungary = HU
Origin identified in invoice CoO column

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Hungary' as country of origin. The invoice contains a dedicated 'CoO' (Country of Origin) column per line item. Line item 000101 shows 'HU' in the CoO column. Per rule 4.5.4, normalization between full country name and ISO alpha-2 code is explicitly allowed. Hungary's ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code is 'HU'. Therefore 'Hungary' (cert) = 'HU' (invoice). This is a direct match. Additionally, Hungary is an EU member state (consistent with the certificate being issued under the 'EUROPEAN UNION' framework), but direct ISO normalization is sufficient. The goods description in box 6 also notes '/ Hungary' after the HS code, confirming the origin per article. No contradictory origin information in the invoice. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Hungary' (ruta 3) kan identifieras i fakturans CoO-kolumn som 'HU' (ISO-landskod för Ungern). Normalisering från fullständigt landsnamn till ISO-kod är tillåten.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate says 'Hungary' but is under 'EUROPEAN UNION' header
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The EU header is the framework under which the certificate is issued. Box 3 specifically states 'Hungary' as the country of origin. Hungary is an EU member state. No conflict exists. Per rule 4.5 the origin in box 3 is the verified origin.

rule_evaluation_log.details: Invoice mentions 'Documentary credit' as mode of transport but no specific LC number is present. Per rule 2.2 critical rule on bank term context, this does not activate the LC exception.
Document A is the certificate file (1 page, Certificate of Origin). Document B is the invoice file (1 page, Customs Invoice). Clear separation. No embedded invoices in certificate file.
All three criteria met: (1) Invoice number 9209877429 matches, (2) Consignor Ericsson AB identifiable, (3) Consignee Safaricom identifiable.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.details: Ericsson AB found in invoice header branding, footer VAT block, remit-to block, and reg office block.
VAT prefix 'SE' and explicit 'Stockholm,Sweden' in reg office confirm Sweden.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Legal entity form abbreviation for consignee (SAFARICOM LIMITED vs SAFARICOM)
rule_evaluation_log.details: 'LIMITED' is a legal entity form word. Core name 'SAFARICOM' is identical.
Bill to field identified as primary: SAFARICOM, PO Box 46350, 00100 NAIROBI, KENYA.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Address differences do not cause MISMATCH for consignee
rule_evaluation_log.details: P.O. Box difference (66827-00800 vs 46350) does not affect consignee verification.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.details: Identity-bearing main designation 'PRINTED BOARD ASSEMB/NPU 1006' found exactly in invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.description: General goods description with invoice reference

rule_evaluation_log.details: Box 7 value: '1 item' used as verification basis.
Numeric value 1 from box 7 identified in invoice line item (1,00 PC).

rule_evaluation_log.description: Multiple quantities — at least one verified
rule_evaluation_log.details: Box 7 (1 item) verified. Gross weight (1,500 KG) also verified with identical notation. Package count (1) also verified.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Ericsson AB i Sverige identifieras som fakturautställare. Mottagaren Safaricom Limited i Kenya identifieras i fakturans Bill to-fält. Varubeskrivningen 'Printed Board Assemb/NPU 1006' och ursprungslandet Ungern överensstämmer exakt. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
non_blocking_observations: Certificate consignee address (P.O. BOX 66827-00800) differs from invoice Bill to address (PO Box 46350, 00100) — this is expected as companies may use different postal addresses for different purposes.
Invoice mentions 'Documentary credit' as shipment mode, but no specific LC number is present — LC exception not activated.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.invoice_value: Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, SE-164 83 STOCKHOLM, Stockholm, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) — consignor namn identifierat i fakturans sidhuvud, footer och remit-to block. Landverifiering via VAT-prefix SE och explicit 'Stockholm,Sweden'.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Ericsson AB' förekommer explicit i fakturans footer (VAT-block, Remit to, Reg office) samt i sidhuvudets logotyp. Land bekräftas via 'Stockholm,Sweden' och VAT-prefix 'SE'. Exakt namnmatchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.

sections.certificate_value: SAFARICOM LIMITED, SAFARICOM HOUSE WAIYAKI WAY, P.O. BOX 66827-00800, NAIROBI, KENYA
sections.invoice_value: SAFARICOM, PO Box 46350, 00100 NAIROBI, KENYA (Bill to)
sections.rule_applied: Förkortning av juridisk bolagsform (4.1.3.6) — skillnaden består enbart i det juridiska formsordet 'LIMITED'. Adressskillnad i postbox påverkar inte bedömningen (4.2.4).
sections.motivation: Kärnnamnet 'SAFARICOM' är identiskt i båda dokumenten. 'LIMITED' är ett juridiskt bolagsformsord som accepteras utelämnat enligt regel 4.1.3.6. Land Kenya överensstämmer. Postboxskillnad (66827-00800 vs 46350) påverkar inte verifieringen.

sections.certificate_value: 1 item (box 7); Total gross weight: 1,500 KG (box 6); 1 package consisting of 1 item (box 6)

sections.motivation: Box 7-kvantitet '1 item' verifieras mot fakturans '1,00 PC' (numeriskt värde 1). Bruttovikt '1,500 KG' i certifikatet matchar exakt fakturans 'Total gross weight 1,500 KG'. Kolliantal '1 package' matchar 'Number of packages: 1'. Samtliga kvantitetsuppgifter är konsistenta och verifierade.

sections.rule_applied: Landnormalisering (4.5.4) — fullständigt landsnamn 'Hungary' normaliserat mot ISO alpha-2-kod 'HU'.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Hungary' i ruta 3 identifieras i fakturans CoO-kolumn som 'HU' (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 för Ungern). Normalisering mellan fullständigt landsnamn och standardiserad landskod är uttryckligen tillåten.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) resulterar i MATCH. Certifikatet från Ericsson AB avseende 'Printed Board Assemb/NPU 1006' med ursprung i Ungern kan verifieras fullt ut mot Customs Invoice 9209877429. Dokumentparet är IDENTISKT och kan rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.85. Comparison result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
